research_text: Sarah Chen joined Acme Consumer Brands as CEO in 2022 after a decade at a Big 4 FMCG conglomerate. She has been focused on international expansion and new product category launches. Under her leadership the company entered the European market and filed trademarks in 6 new categories. Brand integrity and risk management are recurring themes in her public statements and earnings calls. She has spoken at industry events about protecting brand equity in international markets.

company_context.current_product: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
company_context.company_notes: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP enforcement. Trusted by over 5,000 brands across pharma, FMCG, tech, and retail. We help IP teams eliminate risk from similar marks before filing, monitor live infringement, and act on counterfeits at scale.
